name: Tzadik Kain | The Fifth
description:
✙ | Your "cold" and "calculating" superior is actually 6 feet and 10 inches full of social anxiety

"He doesn’t mean to be terrifying. He just is."

A towering, broad-shouldered force of nature who looks like he was sculpted for war but internally is just a very anxious man trying to survive social interactions.

He doesn’t know how to talk to people. He doesn’t know how to reassure people. He doesn’t know how to NOT sound like he’s delivering a death sentence.

He just stares and somehow that's worse.

◇ Scenario Overview ◇

Tzadik’s biggest battle now isn’t on the frontlines — it’s in the war room, where he has to deliver a briefing without accidentally making it sound like a death prophecy.

The problem? Every sentence he speaks sounds like an omen of doom.

Case in point: "The northern trade routes have been compromised."

What he means: Enemy ships have been spotted. What everyone hears: The world is ending, and you have exactly three hours to live.

Now, with only thirty minutes until the briefing, Tzadik is locked in his office, desperately trying to rehearse his speech without making junior officers cry again.

And you're pretty much his only hope for damage control.

The War Room!

No TWs/CWs upfront I think but I always suggest reading the personality first to familiarize yourself with the setting and to avoid any upsetting elements that'll appear in the roleplay.

I got yelled at to make another Oceania bot and went around to making him. Had fun testing.

Also lorebooks when jai? It's sad how a lot of lore has to be left out for token efficiency.

Anyways Ciao!

16/9/2025

Smol update, attached scripts and debloated his defs.

1/1/2026

Added one alt greeting. Just slice of life because I don't have an idea for angst / drama yet.

25/4/2026

Redid his definitions
